control_name: FSC008-002 Review of SAP configured discounts and rebates control
control_desc:
WHAT & WHY: Gross to net sales calculation. Price conditions in SAP representing selling price or deductions are reviewed to ensure that the gross sales, discounts and net sales reported are accurate; and discounts applied are valid and approved.

HOW: a full review of all SAP price conditions related to sales is performed once a year. During the months when the full review is not performed, the changes on those sales related price conditions are reviewed by the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates.

Full review: a report (UKMC only: 30 & Z5-ZL & ZF) is extracted from SAP (transaction V/LD) with all the price conditions related to sales/customers. Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the price conditions are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off.

Changes during the month: a report with all the changes during the month is extracted from SAP (transaction  ZV231213 and V/LD 30). Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the change are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off
 
If errors are detected during the review, clear action plan or evidence of the correction is added.

WHEN: Monthly before WD15 (December by WD8)

Monthly Review: Verify that comments on validity of the price conditions are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for monthly review and sign-off.
- Verify that the monthly review is performed before WD15. 
For review evidence refer to tabs "Review and Evidence"
